text: Grievance Redressal: Contact us Download Forms Grievance Redressal Partner with us Branch Locator Procedure for lodging a complaint Call Center Customers can lodge a complaint by contacting the call center at 1800-102-4565 / 1800-123-4565. The call center is open from 9.00 am to 7.00 pm (Monday to Saturday) Email Customers can lodge a complaint by sending an email to customercare@chola.murugappa.com Via Letter Customers can lodge a complaint by submitting a written complaint to the following address Address - Cholamandalam Investment & Finance Company Limited (CIFCL), Chola Crest, C54-55 &

Super B-4, Thiru-Vi-Ka Industrial Estate, Guindy, Chennai – 600032. Branch Customers can also lodge a complaint by visiting the branch Chola One App Customers can lodge a complaint through the Chola One App Company's Website Customers can lodge a complaint by visiting the company's website at www.cholamandalam.com If the customer has approached any of the above channels and the complaint is not resolved within 10 days, the customer may escalate the complaint to the Head Customer Service Head Customer Service Name : Ms. Lavanyasree Sekar Contact Number : 044 - 40906097 Email ID :

customerservicehead@chola.murugappa.com If the complaint remains unresolved for 15 days after escalation, the customer may further escalate the complaint to the Grievance Redressal Officer (GRO) Grievance Redressal Officer (GRO) Name : Mr. Krishnakumar K.P Contact Number : 044 - 40906114 EMAIL ID : gro@chola1.murugappa.com If the customer does not receive a response from the Company within 30 days, or if the response received is not satisfactory, the customer may lodge a complaint with the RBI Integrated Ombudsman under the Reserve Bank – Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021 on RBI's website -

Click Here Contact Ombudsman: To Know more about the Ombudsman Scheme - Click Here Officer-in-Charge Department of Supervision Regional Office - Chennai Reserve Bank of India Fort Glacis, No.16, Rajaji Salai Chennai 600 001 Tel : 044 - 2539 9189 Contact details of Principal Nodal Officer (PNO)** Name: Mr. Krishnakumar K.P Contact Number: 044 - 40906114 EMAIL ID: principalnodalofficer@chola.murugappa.com Previous Next
